channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Giants legend Victor Cruz talks state of team after it retained coach, general manager despite abysmal season
item.description: The New York Giants face maybe the most important offseason in a generation, and Victor Cruz suggested what they should do in the next few months.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: Quinshon Judkins ran for two touchdowns before Jack Sawyer forced a fumble by his former roommate and Texas quarterback Quinn Ewers that he returned 83 yards for a touchdown with 2:13 left as Ohio State beat Texas 28-14 in the Cotton Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Australian Open 2025: Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner have a real rivalry atop men's tennis
item.description: When Carlos Alcaraz is on court for a training session, perhaps working on his newly revamped service motion, he’s doing so to buttress a game already good enough to claim four Grand Slam titles.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cardinals send team planes to evacuate Rams' players, families and pets from wildfires: report
item.description: The Arizona Cardinals are reportedly sending two of their team planes to Los Angeles to evacuate LA Rams players, their families, team staffers and pets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lakers game postponed Thursday; coach JJ Redick reportedly loses home in Palisades Fire
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers game against the Charlotte Hornets scheduled for Thursday evening has been postponed as the community reels from the devastating fires throughout the city. The team announced the postponement on X on Thursday, stating that it'll be rescheduled to "focus on what matters most.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Athletics agree to $60M, 5-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, AP source says
item.description: (AP) -- The Athletics have agreed to a $60 million, five-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Monday night. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers agree to trade Gavin Lux to Reds: report
item.description: The post World Series shakeup continues in Los Angeles, as the Dodgers are poised to trade starting second-baseman Gavin Lux to the Cincinnati Reds. As reported by ESPN's Jeff Passan, the Dodgers will send Lux to the Reds in exchange for a future draft pick and outfield prospect Mike Sirota.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Sensabaugh pours in 34 as Jazz crush Miami, 136-100
item.description: MIAMI (AP) - Brice Sensabaugh scored a career-high 34 points, John Collins finished with 24, and the Utah Jazz snapped a five-game losing streak with a 136-100 rout over the Miami Heat on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals keep their playoff hopes alive by edging the Steelers 19-17
item.description: Joe Burrow passed for 277 yards and a touchdown, Cade York kicked four field goals and the Cincinnati Bengals kept their slim playoff hopes alive with a 19-17 win over the floundering Pittsburgh Steelers on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU gets trounced by #14 Houston 86-55
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team came into the Big 12 season thinking it could compete with the top teams in one of the toughest leagues in the nation. But if Saturday was any indication, the Cougars have a long way to go.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
